chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.1746 of 2020 Cr. Misc. Application No.476 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail case. 28.10.2021 Mr.Allah Bux Narejo, Advocate for applicant. Mr.Rehan Ali Rind, Advocate for complainant. Mr.Siraj Ali Chandio, Addl. PG. ************* Omar Sial, J: Abdul Latif and Sajid Ali, the applicants, have sought pre-arrest bail in Crime No.1117/2020 registered under Sections 302 & 397, PPC at the Shah Latif Town Police Station. Earlier, their application seeking bail was dismissed on 09.11.2020 by the learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Malir. 2. At the very outset, I have been informed by the learned Counsel for Applicants, which has been confirmed by the learned Additional Prosecutor General, that the trial in the case is at the verge of its completion and that it is only the IO who is left to be examined. At this late stage any observation made by this Court may have the potential of influencing the decision of the learned trial Court in the case, as such, it would not be proper to allow or dismiss the bail. Reliance in this regard is placed on 2002 SCMR 1381. The bail application along with the cancellation of bail application are being disposed of with the directions to the learned trial Court to conclude the trial preferably within a period of one month and report compliance through the learned MIT-II of this Court. JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
